---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest an improvement to HashFarm
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

**Problem / motivation**  
What limitation or pain point does this address?

**Proposed solution**  
What should HashFarm do differently?

**Alternatives considered**  
Other ways to solve the same problem.

**Operator impact**  
Who benefits (gaming PC only, remote rigs, monitor users)? Any new env vars or breaking changes?

**Additional context**  
Mockups, upstream links (Monero / P2Pool / XMRig), or prior art.

**Checklist**

- [ ] I searched existing feature requests
- [ ] I am willing to help test or document the change
